name: @crmy/core
description: CRMy — operational customer context for AI agents

scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:web & wait
scripts.lint: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
